title: Bit Digital Finalizes GPU Supply Contract with Boosteroid
text: Bit Digital Inc has completed a master service agreement with Boosteroid Inc, a leading cloud gaming provider, for an initial GPU supply order. The initial order comprises 300 GPUs expected to generate approximately $4.6 million in revenue over a five-year period. Bit Digital anticipates completing deliveries and beginning revenue generation by the end of November 2024. The agreement includes expansion options, allowing Boosteroid to increase orders in 100-server increments up to 50,000 servers total. Should the full deployment occur, the deal could represent a potential $700 million revenue opportunity across the five-year term, though contingent on deployment plans and market conditions. The customized servers feature AMD EPYC fourth-generation CPUs paired with RX7900XT GPUs, specifically designed for Boosteroid's cloud gaming infrastructure needs. Boosteroid operates as the world's third-largest cloud gaming provider, maintaining a network of 22 data centers across Europe, North America, and South America, with 10 additional facilities expected to launch by year-end 2024. Bit Digital's CEO Sam Tabar expressed optimism about the partnership, characterizing it as positioning both firms for substantial growth opportunity with significant expansion anticipated in 2025.
